lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Can you hear me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course! I'm wearing an amulet of ghostspeak.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...I can, but I'm not wearing an amulet of ghostspeak... A-am I dead?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...I can. Are you a ghost?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: I'm no ghost! I'm a spirit, I'm injecting my thoughts into your head.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that's... interesting. Also rather disturbing...

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Try not to think about it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you imbue my sceptre?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Of course I can... But first, you must show me whatever treasure lies within that cradle and make sure that your account is safe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is my account safe?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: To make sure your account is secured, please turn on the authenticator. Simply visit the support link on the oldschool.runescape.com website.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that sounds like a great idea, I'll go do that.

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: It seems you have the authenticator set up, that's perfect! Now just show me the treasure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is this the treasure?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Oh marvellous! If only I had corporeal form I'd be able to wear them, but alas...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So could you imbue my sceptre?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: It seems your account isn't as secure as it could be, I'm afraid I can't imbue your sceptre.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Of course, of course! In fact if you have more than one I'll imbue all of them!

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: There you go, now that I've imbued all of your sceptres, once they run out of charges they will no longer break and they can be charged with any piece of the sceptre you find.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you very much! How many charges does each piece give?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Most of them give 3, although the left skull gives 5. Each completed tier of the Varrock achievement diary will get you one extra charge per piece and allow your sceptre to hold 4 more charges.

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: You can use a chisel to break a sceptre piece into fragments, then use those to charge the sceptre instead. More flexible if you ask me.

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Finally, be warned that if you disable your authenticator, the imbue on the sceptre will be removed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fantastic! It's best I keep my authenticator activated then. Good bye Solztun!

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Stay safe, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: I am Solztun, the greatest barbarian explorer!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's very nice to meet you, Solztun! I'm [player name].

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ... so, you were exploring this place?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Yes, my sister told me not to go, she said it was dangerous and that I'm no fighter. Unfortunately... she was correct.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh! Your sister is Litara, the woman out on the surface? How come she was correct?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: I died... Of course, I tried escaping, long before I'd made it to the treasure, but I was shot with arrows just as I approached the exit.

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: As I said, I am Solztun, the greatest barbarian explorer! I came to explore this place, but unfortunately I died long before I made it to the treasure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nobody came to help?!

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Oh no, they had no idea I was hurt, I guess they assumed I'd found the treasure and made a new life for myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Were you not a fan of the barbarian life style?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: It was all death and pillaging, I prefer the finer things in life, like exploration and discovery!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, I too enjoy those.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you here?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: I came for treasure!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh right, you were looking for what's in that cradle?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Yes, but alas, I'm dead.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I guess I could show you... for a price.

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Hmm... I don't have much to offer, but if you happen upon a skull sceptre, I could make it stronger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stronger you say... In what way?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Currently the sceptre is fragile, it breaks once all charges have been used. Show me the treasure and I could imbue it so it can be recharged with any sceptre piece.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You, my dead friend, have a deal!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Stay safe, adventurer.

sections.title: Using a Skull sceptre on him

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you imbue my sceptre?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: Of course I can... But first, you must show me whatever treasure lies within that cradle and make sure that your account is safe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is my account safe?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: To make sure your account is secured, please turn on the authenticator. Simply visit the support link on the oldschool.runescape.com website.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that sounds like a great idea, I'll go do that.

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: It seems you have the authenticator set up, that's perfect! Now just show me the treasure.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is this the treasure?

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: No, that's not it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I didn't show you anything.

lines.speaker: Solztun
lines.text: I sense that you don't have the treasure.
